description_long: This is a monumental obelisk constructed primarily from light-colored stone, set atop a multi-tiered, rectangular platform with several steps leading up to the main structure. The obelisk features elaborate sculptural ornamentation, including two large, seated angelic figures with wings, positioned symmetrically on either side of the central shaft. The front face displays a relief plaque and a shield motif, while the rear and sides are adorned with additional sculptural details and floral garlands. The stonework is weathered, with visible patina and moss in crevices, suggesting age and outdoor exposure. The overall design is grand and commemorative, typical of memorials or monuments found in urban parks or plazas. The structure is imposing, with a solid, immovable presence and intricate artistic details.
description: A grand stone obelisk with winged angel sculptures, ornate reliefs, and a multi-stepped base, weathered and monumental in appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main angelic figure with wings, a central relief plaque, and the shield motif on the base.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backs of the angelic figures, a large rectangular plaque, and floral garlands.
description_view_2: Front-left angle emphasizing the symmetry of the angelic sculptures and the stepped platform.
description_view_3: Rear-right angle showing the detailed relief on the obelisk shaft and the arrangement of the base steps.
attribute_inscription: There appears to be a relief plaque and shield motif on the front, and a large rectangular plaque on the rear, but the text or details are not legible from the images.
attribute_ornamentation: Elaborate sculptural ornamentation includes two large winged angelic figures seated on either side, floral garlands, a shield motif, and relief plaques on the shaft and base.
attribute_base_design: The base is a multi-tiered, rectangular platform with several wide steps, constructed from stone and featuring decorative reliefs and motifs.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is flat and rectangular, lacking any pointed or uniquely decorated features, and is finished in the same stone material as the shaft.
attribute_surrounding_features: The obelisk is immediately surrounded by a stepped stone platform; no additional features such as fences, vegetation, or paving are visible.
